footer.tagline: Kesher — connecting the Warsaw Jewish community to the world's Jewish opportunities.

about.title: Your bridge to the world's Jewish opportunities
about.subtitle: Kesher brings together every program, scholarship, trip, and fellowship the Jewish world has to offer — curated for the Warsaw Jewish community.
about.why1_body: Instead of scrolling through dozens of websites, we scan the biggest Jewish organizations daily — Masa, Birthright, Onward, Hillel, Pardes and more — and surface what's relevant.
about.why2_body: Tell us your age, the languages you understand, and what interests you, and we'll match you with opportunities that actually fit. No noise, no overwhelm.
about.why3_body: When a program you care about is closing soon, we send you an email or push notification. So no opportunity slips by.
about.how_step1: <signup>Sign up for free</signup> — with Google or email. 30 seconds.
about.how_step2: <profile>Fill out a quick profile</profile> — age, languages, interests. One minute.
about.how_step3: <opps>Get matched opportunities</opps> — see 5 matches immediately, then receive alerts on new ones.
about.what_intro: Every opportunity the Jewish world offers — filtered, translated into 3 languages, and tailored to you:
about.cta_section_body: Completely free, now and forever. You can sign out or delete your account anytime, with one click.

install.title: Install Kesher as an app
install.android_subtitle: Quick install — launch Kesher like a regular app, no browser needed.
